pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or lack of support for newer features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; without this change, the build would still target Java 11, failing to utilize or comply with the new JDK version requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the flyway-database-postgresql dependency to support Flyway 9+ modular database driver structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ (bundled with Spring Boot 3) removed database-specific drivers from the core artifact; without this dependency, Flyway will fail at runtime with a missing driver error for PostgreSQL.
